description_long: This is a large commercial passenger airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage painted primarily white, featuring blue accents and a blue tail adorned with white stars. The aircraft has four underwing turbofan engines, two on each side, with blue engine nacelles and silver rims. The wings are low-mounted and swept back, each ending in a small, upward-angled winglet. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the vertical fin colored blue and decorated with stars. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible, and the main passenger doors and windows are distributed along the sides. The airplane is branded with the name 'HiFly' in blue lettering on the forward fuselage.
description: A large, white commercial passenger airplane with blue accents, four underwing turbofan engines, swept low wings with winglets, and a blue star-patterned tail.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, four engines, and the blue tail with white stars.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the 'HiFly' branding, engine placement, and the blue tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal and vertical stabilizers, engine arrangement, and winglets.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the fuselage and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Quad underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear (not visibly extended).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
